title: monarda fistulosa var. fistulosa
intro: Monarda fistulosa var. fistulosa, also known as the wild bergamot or purple bergamot, is a perennial herb native to North America. It is a member of the mint family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Monarda fistulosa var. fistulosa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy for various health concerns.
